items.claim: Conor McGregor has never pulled out of a fight during fight week.
items.quote: He's never pulled out on a fight week type of situation.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not won a professional fight in over seven years.
items.quote: Conor McGregor's not a won a fight in over seven years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.
items.quote: Conor hasn't fought in five years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered a severe leg injury in his last fight.
items.quote: last time we saw him, absolutely brutal leg injury.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been consistently active fighting top-tier competition across multiple divisions.
items.quote: Max Holloway who's been in there fighting some of the best guys um in the division in multiple divisions at this point.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's durability, grit, and tenacity have declined since his peak 10 years ago.
items.quote: the durability is not, the grit's not, the tenacity, the heart, the willing to hit to get hit.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's performance in his rematch against Nate Diaz was poor despite the win.
Conor McGregor is distracted by personal issues and potential substance abuse.
items.quote: he's got personal issues and probably drug issues.

items.claim: Max Holloway's volume and activity level provide a significant advantage over Conor McGregor.
items.quote: I think volume, just activity. Um I know people are going to talk about size and all of that, but one guy's been active
